summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard repaired after deterministic validation. The validator identified every listed target in this shard as security-sensitive, so each item is quarantined with a non-mutating route_security action. No GitHub mutation, canonical choice, closeout, merge, fix, or scope expansion is planned.
